# Linaw Dinig Hearing Aid Center

> Independent, private hearing care practice in the Philippines ("Linaw Dinig" means "Clear Hearing"). Established June 2021. Hearing tests for adults and children, hearing aid counseling & fitting, repairs and follow-up care across four clinics: Tanay (Rizal, main office), Cebu City, Dasmariñas City (Cavite) and Rosario (La Union).

Key facts:
- Qualified audiologists and audiometrists; no referral needed to book.
- Hearing aid brands offered: Unitron, Bernafon, Beltone. Also assists with cochlear implants, bone-anchored hearing aids (BAHA) and CROS/Bi-CROS aids.
- Hearing test prices range from PHP 550 to PHP 8,000 depending on the procedure.
- Payments: cash, GCash, bank transfer or deposit, debit and credit cards (Mastercard, Visa).
- Contact: linaw.dinig.hac@gmail.com · Tanay 0917 553 2999 · Cebu 0917 851 8899 · Dasma 0917 770 0288 · La Union 0917 620 9898

## Services

- [Comprehensive Hearing Evaluation](/services/hearing-evaluation): Adult tests (pure tone & speech audiometry, tympanometry), pediatric tests (newborn hearing screening, play audiometry, ABR/BAER & ASSR), occupational and maritime/aviation screening.
- [Hearing Aid Counseling & Fitting](/services/hearing-aid-fittings): Guided selection, fitting and fine-tuning matched to lifestyle, degree of hearing loss and budget.
- [Hearing Aid Repair & Maintenance](/services/hearing-aid-repairs): Same-day in-clinic cleaning and minor fixes; manufacturer repairs take 2 weeks to 1 month.
- [Follow-up Care & Counseling](/services/follow-up-care): Fine-tuning, re-programming, cleaning and family counseling.
- [Assistive Listening Devices & Accessories](/services/assistive-listening-devices): TV streamers, remote microphones, chargers, batteries and consumables.

## Branches

- [Tanay, Rizal — Main Office](/branches/tanay): 98 Unit B G-Complex Sampaloc Rd., Brgy. Plaza Aldea, Tanay, Rizal. Mon–Fri 9AM–5PM.
- [Cebu City](/branches/cebu): 3rd Flr. Anchor Lab Medical Center, Aspac Bldg., N. Bacalso Ave., Sambag I, Cebu City. Mon–Fri 9AM–5PM.
- [Dasmariñas City, Cavite](/branches/dasmarinas): 2nd Flr. JaroMed and Diagnostic Center, Aguinaldo Highway, Salitran I. By appointment, 9AM–5PM.
- [Rosario, La Union](/branches/la-union): Rosario Diagnostic Center, MacArthur Highway. Mon–Fri 9AM–4PM.

## For Patients

- [New Patient Information](/patients/new-patient-info): What to bring, parking and access per branch, fees and payments.
- [What to Expect](/patients/what-to-expect): Step-by-step guide to a hearing appointment and how to read an audiogram.
- [FAQs](/patients/faqs): Prices, payment options, hearing aid lifespan and warranty, trials, repairs and referrals.
- [Book an Appointment](/book): Online booking with preferred clinic, date and time.

## About

- [About Us](/about): Mission, vision and the story behind the name.
- [Our Audiologists](/about/audiologists): Team credentials and approach.
- [Our Clinics](/about/clinic): All four locations with addresses, phone numbers and hours.
- [Why Choose Us](/about/why-choose-us): Independent practice, qualified professionals, flexible payment plans.
